flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Orange County Community College fell 24% between 2006 and 2009 (17.6% → 13.5%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Orange County Community College rose 17% between 2006 and 2009 ($3.3k → $3.9k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Orange County Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.8% → 0.0%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Orange County Community College rose 16% between 2021 and 2024 (52.5% → 60.7%).
